title: dcostenco/prism-mcp
summary: The Mind Palace for AI Agents - HIPAA-hardened Cognitive Architecture with on-device LLM (prism-coder:7b), Hebbian learning, ACT-R spreading activation, adversarial evaluation, persistent memory, multi-agent Hivemind and visual dashboard. Zero API keys required.

title: cafitac/hermit-agent
summary: Run Claude Code 50–80% cheaper. Hermit is an MCP executor with Codex-first auto routing (codex → z.ai → local), so Claude stays the orchestrator while cheaper models do the heavy lifting.

title: Keshavsharma-code/DeepSleep-beta
summary: Zero-cost background coding agent. Watches your files, dreams while you are away, answers what was I working on — 100% local, no cloud, no subscriptions.

title: isaacsight/kernel
summary: kbot — the AI agent that dreams, learns, and evolves. 764+ tools, 35 agents, 20 providers. Music production, iPhone control, financial analysis, cyber threat intel. Always-on daemon. Runs offline. npm i -g @kernel.chat/kbot

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: sandraschi/yahboom-mcp
summary: FastMCP 3.2 server plus Webapp for controlling the Yahboom Raspbot v2 robot car

title: syklon99/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: Uragon005/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: azerozero/grob
summary: LLM proxy with built-in DLP and regulatory compliance. Redacts secrets before they reach the API. EU AI Act, GDPR, HDS/PCI DSS ready. Multi-provider failover, live TUI, virtual keys, fan-out. 6 MB, zero deps. Rust.

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.

title: jcviau81/voxyflow
summary: Your personal AI bot for getting projects done. Execute tasks directly from kanban cards. Local-first: Claude Max, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible API.

title: sandraschi/openmanus-mcp
summary: FastMCP 3.1 Server + Webapp wrapping OpenManus (FOSS CLI, 100% local LLM when you configure Ollama / LM Studio in OpenManus). Not Manus.im.

title: sandraschi/openclaude-mcp
summary: FastMCP 3.2 server plus Webapp for using the leaked Claude Code locally with ollama and open weight models. Kairos and cat included

title: llmobserve/llmobserve
summary: LLM observability for Go developers. Zero external services. 3 lines of code.

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is a fully extensible and explainable workplace AI platform for enterprise search and workflow automation

title: xencon/aixcl
summary: Local first development platform with agentic SDLC.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: ronnedahl/local-voice-ai
summary: Local voice AI assistant – Swedish & English.  Speech-to-text with Whisper, LLM via Ollama,  TTS with Piper. Built with FastAPI. Runs 100% locally.
